column2: pivot_longer(cols = c(rhcc4_f, rhcc4_m, rhcc4_u), names_to = "CHW", names_prefix = "rhcc4_", values_to = "rhcc4") %>%
mutate(CHW = factor(CHW, levels = c("f", "m", "u"), labels = c("Female", "Male", "Unknown")))) +
aes(y = rhcc4, x = adm0, fill = adm0, alpha = CHW),
aes(y = rhcc4, x = adm0, fill = adm0, alpha = CHW),
geom_point(aes(y = `RHCC Target`, x = adm0, fill = adm0, alpha = "Target"), color = NA) +
labs(fill = "Country", x ="Country", y = "Total CHWs equipped", alpha = "CHW gender") +
